# 02.01-upgrade-onlym-slides: Retarget OnlyM.Slides to net10.0-windows and resolve package/API issues

# 02.01-upgrade-onlym-slides: Upgrade OnlyM.Slides

## Objective
Retarget `OnlyM.Slides` from `net9.0-windows` to `net10.0-windows` and resolve package/API compatibility issues in this project.

## Scope
- `OnlyM.Slides/OnlyM.Slides.csproj`
- Related source files in `OnlyM.Slides/` only

## Done when
- Project targets `net10.0-windows`
- Project restores and builds successfully
- Package/API compatibility issues in this project are resolved
